bounties.title: ZABAL GAMEZ AD
bounties.description:
Make the best ad for ZABAL Gamez. Any format. Best one wins 0.0125 ETH on Base and we run it.

We need ads. Real ones we will run. Best submission

claims.title: This Startup Is Fixing Our Broken Food System… The Story, The Impact, The Future— Farmdrop
claims.description:
We keep hearing that the food system is “broken”… but this conversation shows what fixing it actually looks like.

From learning with farmers across Spain, Mexico, and Guatemala to leading a 15-year grassroots movement, Hannah shares how **FarmDrop** is rebuilding the connection between producers and people—using tech, community, and a mission-driven model.

This isn’t just about buying food.
It’s about:
• Giving farmers control over pricing and distribution
• Reducing waste through smarter systems
• Expanding access to real, local food
• Redefining what “local” truly means

FarmDrop blends the simplicity of a farmers market with the power of technology—creating a system where communities don’t just consume food… they participate in it.


👇 Watch the full story:

https://youtu.be/Y8ykMqUTlS4?si=rujIEK0S2POz3U8h

claims.title: ZAAL Build Contribution
claims.description:
The receipt is your portable proof package. Humans can read it, and agents can inspect it.
It is useful because it keeps the claim organized:
what you built
where it lives
which proof image was used
when the receipt was made
what public posts should point to it
Simple Version
You ship something.
Proof Drop helps you package the proof.
POIDH is just one destination/export for this particular ZABAL bounty. The receipt should be useful even if someone shares it on Farcaster, X, GitHub, a grant form, a client update, or a totally different bounty.
